programmes.show_description: Cootie and the Blowhard: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional Rhode Island family. Stewie fears that he has a terminal case of cooties, and Peter enjoys Bonnie's cooking.
Beyond the Alcove Or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying And Love Klaus: US animated comedy series. Klaus gets a new sense of mojo and becomes cool, but he makes Francine jealous too.
The Book of Fischer: US animated comedy series. Stan takes Steve to the barbershop to mingle with his circle of friends, and Jeff's diary becomes the bible of a futuristic religion.
Fraud of the Dead: Docu-Pocalypse: Animated comedy. A documentary film profiling about Louise's superhuman archery skills is interrupted by some unexpectedly hungry visitors.
Escape from Which Island?: Animated comedy. Mr Fischoeder enlists Bob to be his personal chef on a glamping trip. Linda gives the kids a crash course on cocktail party etiquette.
Justin Junior: Sitcom about three young men who reside in ancient Rome. Grumio meets the father who left him on a hill as a baby, and who now wants to make up for lost time.
Stephen Mulhern hosts another episode of the exciting and iconic gameshow as a brave contestant takes on the infamous Banker for a chance at winning a life-changing cash prize.
Shopping from home.
Animated series based on the DC Comics superhero team. Batman and Gordon time travel to the future to avoid chores, but they still find ways to watch TV.
Oregon Fail / Duck Call / Life's a Beach: Animated series. Yosemite Sam has wagon woes, Elmer Fudd upgrades his duck-calling plan, and a family of bears enjoy a day at the beach.
Heart of Evil: Animated fun with Scooby-Doo and the gang. The gang work with the Blue Falcon and Dynomutt to stop a dragon robot that the Blue Falcon has wanted to catch for years.
Trading Chases: Animated adventure series. Fred switches places with the tour guide at a history museum to give him a chance to solve a mystery involving a Egyptian crocodile deity.
Be Quiet, Scooby-Doo!: Animated adventure series. The gang enter the Crystal Canopy, a labyrinth of intricate crystal formations, to solve the mystery of the creepy Crystal Crawler!
Lakeside Manor Oakville: House-hunting show. Scott and Brittany are hoping to find their dream home in Oakville in Ontario so they can move onto marriage and having kids together.

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. Greg gets a job but seems to be out of practice, and Billie and Sue find Chatty in a bad way that leads to a visit to hospital and a worrying call.
The drama continues in Essex with Ella questioning Jodie's loyalty, Elma organising a surprise 30th birthday bash redo for Courtney, and Amy's brother Wills arriving on the scene.
Head Over 'Hills': US reality series. NeNe extends an olive branch to Cynthia and Cynthia's boyfriend Mike decides that he's ready to take things to the next level.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: A Caribbean Send Off: US reality series. A catamaran ride ends in rough waters before the final dinner in Saint Lucia leads to some very ruffled feathers.
Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show as three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles and compete to win a 3,000-pound prize.
Graham Norton welcomes essential skills teacher Orla, development manager Kelly, and events duty officer Ben as they take on the fabled Wheel in the hope of winning 50,000 pounds.
There is cause for celebration in Essex as Dani finally passes her driving test, but Saff's decision to throw a congratulatory party for her goes wrong when she invites Junaid.
Cheshire Queens: Reality series. Rachel is stunned by her birthday surprise, and the girls pull together for a night of triumph and tears at Ell's charity event.
A Whine of a Time: US reality series. The ladies head to the Toronto Carnival in Canada and Porsha has a few things to get off her chest before the festivities begin.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Reunion Part One: US reality series. The ladies of Beverly Hills reunite to work through hurt feelings and shocking allegations on the heels of a tumultuous year.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Nadine Coyle, Rick Edwards and Jake Wood all trying to guess well-known phrases from animated clues.
Graham Norton invites AJ Odudu, Gok Wan and Charlotte Church to try their luck at spinning the Wheel and solving puzzles to win big for charity.
Find out how clever you are as Lee Mack presents the quiz where it doesn't matter how good you are at quizzes and where 100 contestants could win up to 100,000 pounds.

programmes.show_name: TikTok: Murder Gone Viral - The Killing of Sania Khan
programmes.show_description: Documentary. After surviving an attempt on her life, TikTok star Sania Khan goes viral campaigning for South Asian women's rights but is imperilled.
The Lois Quagmire: Anarchic animated sitcom. Lois takes Quagmire to her high school reunion instead of Peter, and the other Griffins try to cover up a pizza delivery man's death.
Lawyer Guy: Peter hires Brick Baker - the town's new lawyer - to represent him in litigation against his neighbour, and Brian and Stewie become lobstermen.
Peterschmidt Manor: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter turns the Pewterschmidt mansion into a hotel when Lois and Carter attend the funeral of Lois' childhood nanny.
A Song of Knives and Fire: US animated comedy series. Francine begins to start fires in order to make Stan's new firefighting job more exciting, and Roger becomes a knife-thrower.
A Roger Story: US animated comedy series. Steve and Snot are forced to stop being friends after friction forms between their mothers, so they enlist Roger's help to break the ice.
The Nightmare 2 Days Before Christmas: Animated comedy. The Belchers are forced to spend Christmas at Mr Fischoeder's old hunting lodge when their power goes out.
The (Raccoon) King and I: Animated comedy. When Linda takes to caring for an injured raccoon, she makes a mistake during a neighbourhood block party that could endanger its life.
Uniform: Sitcom set in a fictional police training college. The excited recruits get to wear their uniforms for the first time and Dev reveals a deeply personal issue to Steph.
The Vestal: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. Stylax pursues a romance with a Vestal Virgin who guards the city's sacred flame, and Grumio spots a business opportunity involving cheese.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Animated series about the superhero team. As commercials are the only part of the show he likes, Control Freak makes extra advertisements to torment the Titans.
Pearl of My Dreams / Down the Drain / Mech-A-Mess: Animated series. Porky Pig and Daffy Duck dive for pearls, Elmer Fudd has a hunting mishap, and Wile E. Coyote gets a new suit.
Theatre of the Doomed: Animated adventures with Scooby and the gang. A brand-new theatre production is under threat by a mummified corpse from Mystery Cove's ancient past.
Party Like It's 1899: Animated adventure series. Daphne brings the gang to a Victorian murder mystery party where a headless count is about to start kidnapping people for real!
Screama Donna: Animated adventure series. In order to solve the mystery of a ghostly performer haunting her former venue, the gang has to pretend to be a rock band themselves!
Ash, Isabel and Helen all hope to impress cleaner and musician Jodie from Milton Keynes with their style choices.

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. With Chatty in a great place and the summer holidays in full swing, Billie and Greg decide to throw a barbecue to take their mind off of things.
There is cause for celebration in Essex as Dani finally passes her driving test, but Saff's decision to throw a congratulatory party for her goes wrong when she invites Junaid.
A Whine of a Time: US reality series. The ladies head to the Toronto Carnival in Canada and Porsha has a few things to get off her chest before the festivities begin.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Reunion Part One: US reality series. The ladies of Beverly Hills reunite to work through hurt feelings and shocking allegations on the heels of a tumultuous year.
Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show as three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles and compete to win a 3,000-pound prize.
Graham Norton invites AJ Odudu, Gok Wan and Charlotte Church to try their luck at spinning the Wheel and solving puzzles to win big for charity.
Love is in the air in Essex as it's Junaid and Joe's one-year anniversary, Saff, Ella, Elma and Wills play padel, and Amy and Jordan host an intervention for Harry and Saff.
The Intervention: Reality series. Dawn Ward is back in Cheshire and jumping out of a plane. Sheena hosts a perfume launch that gets fiery when Lystra confronts Rachel.
Living on the Edge: US reality series. NeNe receives a frosty reception when she arrives in Toronto. A group trust exercise forces the ladies to live on the edge.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Reunion Part Two: US reality series. The 14th series reunion continues as Kyle and Dorit face off over Kyle's text to PK and put more strain on their friendship.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Les Dennis, Rebecca Sarker, and Jordan Stephens all trying to 'say what they see' for their chosen charity.
Graham Norton invites celebrities Tom Allen, Michelle Visage and Eddie Kadi to spin the Wheel to get the chance to play for 50,000 pounds for charity.
Find out how clever you are as Lee Mack presents the quiz where it doesn't matter how good you are at quizzes and where 100 contestants could win up to 100,000 pounds.
A State of Confusion: US cooking competition. There's a clash of culinary identities as the chefs are tasked with blending two distinct US state delicacies into one harmonious dish.
The Chicken or the Meg: Anarchic animated sitcom. Meg dates a chicken that she meets on a reality dating show and decides to move out when Peter disapproves of their relationship.
HBO-No: Anarchic animated sitcom. The Griffins present their versions of Game of Thrones, Succession, and Big Little Lies, three shows broadcast by the US cable network HBO.
